mission.title: crossplane: Implement Go Templates as a Composition Function
mission.description: Implement Go Templates as a Composition Function. Requested by 12+ users.

steps.title: Check current crossplane deployment
steps.description:
Verify your crossplane version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane
helm list -n crossplane 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working crossplane installation.

steps.title: Review crossplane configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant crossplane configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane
kubectl get configmap -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=crossplane
```
### What problem are you facing?

We think there will be several generic/reusable Composition Functions. Functions that folks can grab (e.g. from https://marketplace.upbound.io) and use without needing to write code.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Implement Go Templates as a Composition Function
steps.description:
Install the Go Templating Composition Function from the crossplane-contrib repository:
```bash
# Install function-go-templating as a Crossplane package
kubectl apply -f - <<EOF
apiVersion: pkg.crossplane.io/v1beta1
kind: Function
metadata:
  name: function-go-templating
spec:
  package: xpkg.upbound.io/crossplane-contrib/function-go-templating:v0.4.1
EOF
```
Then use Go templates in your Compositions to define how composite resources map to managed resources. See the function-go-templating repository (https://github.com/crossplane-contrib/function-go-templating) for examples and documentation.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane
kubectl get events -n crossplane --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Implement Go Templates as a Composition Function" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Go Templates were implemented as a Composition Function in the separate function-go-templating repository (https://github.com/crossplane-contrib/function-go-templating). This function allows users to define Crossplane compositions using Go templates, providing a flexible and familiar templating language for generating composed resources.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with crossplane installed or the issue environment reproducible.
